subparts.text: How Multi-Layer-Perceptron enhances the capability of neural network? 2.5

What is the neuron saturation problem in neural networks? 2.5

Sparse and Dense features dictate the requirements for attribute specific updates during Backpropagation. How Gradient Descent handles this scenario? Explain with two different approaches. c. Derive the update rule for Multi-Layer-Perceptron.

questions.question_text: Attempt any two parts Explain the Autoencoders and mathematical relation to PCA. Why the model generalization and model complexity are related? Derive the supportive mathematical expression. How the layer wise pre training enabled the neural networks achieve convergence?
